2175760.name: Video Horror Society - Deathwire
2175760.description:
A Rampaging Robot at Your Command


You may know it as The Bionic Butcher, a supercharged meat grinder bent on bloodshed... You’ve heard legends of The Titanium Tyrant, a harbinger hailing hardware from the heart of Replitech (supercharged by Sponsor MajorVolt™). It’s the Blight of the Voltage Vice, The Beam Matrix Backbreaker, the only undefeated executioner in Eviscerator history! SAY ITS NAME! Raise your foam fingers for the lean, mean, killing machine, IT’S DEATHWIRE!

The newest addition to your monster roster is our most ambitious and dangerous creation to date. Launched with the free Eviscerator origin map, Deathwire comes to life from a futuristic fantasy game show where it rules over any champion or robot that dares enter the ring.

Wheeling and Dealing Damage


Deathwire commands a powerful kit of carnage with 3 supercharged powers to play with. Scan for teens using its Beam Matrix and send a shockwave into your victims with the Voltage Vise. Speed into action with the signature Death Drift that transforms Deathwire into a rampaging robotic menace.


BEAM MATRIX
Deathwire will sweep a targeted area with a sensor beam, revealing any teens within it for a few seconds.

VOLTAGE VISE
Deathwire will fire an energy pulse in a cone that will shock all teens within it for a short time, slowing them and preventing their actions.

DEATH DRIFT
Deathwire can switch between Assault mode and Drift mode at will. While in Drift mode, movement speed is increased but Deathwire cannot attack or use Voltage Vise.

Robo-Power your Playstyle

Alongside an action packed trilogy of terror, Deathwire comes with its own journey that reveals 3 additional monster perks:

An Anti-hero for the Ages

Programmed to Eviscerate and at your command! Challenge yourself through a trilogy of Deathwire origin movies to discover the Titanium Tyrant’s coded secrets. Unlock exclusive trilogy costumes along with unique rewards for completing this bionic butcher’s scenes and movies. Download Deathwire today and terrorize your friends far into the future…
